underlying_goal: Redesign launchpad pages to remove purple/orange colors, unify to blue/green/white palette, apply glassmorphism card styles consistent with existing PP dashboard, and improve information layout
friction_detail: First attempt to fix card transparency had no visible effect due to MUI global overrides conflicting with sx styles.
brief_summary: User wanted launchpad pages redesigned with unified blue/green/white colors and glassmorphism cards; Claude rewrote 15 files, fixed a transparency issue after one failed attempt, and pushed all changes.
